intro.text: Hello.  Welcome to the Free Trade City of Mothergreen.
Let me know if I can help you with anything.

dialogue.text: Don't try to start any trouble okay?
Mothergreen exists on the intersection of the Fayto and Signum Leylines.
Why are leylines important?  Well airships need them to travel... otherwise you're burning too much magical fuel.
The city is run by a Mercantile collective that has its own army.
Huh? Rabbitfolk? Why do you think I would dislike Rabbitfolk?
I miss going on vacation to Madeline, they have great restaurants there, but no chance I'm going there with the war and all.
I hope we don't get too involved in the Dacquoise war....
The Riannon Institute of Alchemy?  Its world famous, only the Merlin Academy of Magic in Northi is even close.
My sword style?  Hah.  Aurora Blade Style obviously... Idris was a legend in Mothergreen!
Angel's Sword Guild?  Ugh... I don't want to talk about it... but they cause so many problems.
